settings.subtext: Bloomli started with a simple frustration: hair care was either hype or homework. So we built one honest ritual instead. Three products that work together, explained in plain language.

settings.heading: It started on a bathroom shelf crowded with almost-finished bottles.
settings.body:
Like a lot of women, we kept buying hope in a bottle: a pill for shine here, an oil for growth there. Each one promised everything, and most were forgotten within weeks.

The research told a quieter story. Hair responds to steady nutrition, a cared-for scalp, and time. Nothing dramatic, nothing overnight. That honesty felt rare enough to build a brand around.

So Bloomli makes exactly three things, designed to work as one ritual: a gummy, a capsule, and a botanical serum. A line small enough to obsess over, simple enough to actually keep up with.
settings.primary_placeholder: [ PHOTO: Founder portrait, warm natural light ]
settings.secondary_placeholder: [ PHOTO: Early notes and product samples ]

settings.title: The gap
settings.description: Shelves of single-ingredient pills and big promises, but no simple way to stay consistent. We kept asking why hair wellness had to feel like homework.

settings.title: The ritual
settings.description: Three products designed as one routine: nourishment from within, botanical care for the scalp. Tested by independent labs before anything ships.

settings.title: The bloom
settings.description: A growing community of women who chose patience over panic. We answer every email, read every review, and keep refining.

settings.heading: Three chapters in, still growing.
settings.subheadline: The short version of how a frustration became a ritual, and where it goes next.

settings.image_placeholder: [ PHOTO: Morning ritual, gummies beside coffee ]
settings.title: Consistency beats intensity
settings.text: Hair responds to what you do daily, not what you do once. Everything we make is designed to be easy to keep up with: pleasant to take, quick to apply, simple to reorder.

settings.image_placeholder: [ PHOTO: Journal with routine check marks ]
settings.title: Biology sets the timeline
settings.text: We say 8 to 12 weeks because that is how hair actually works. No brand can rush a growth cycle, and we would rather lose a sale than pretend otherwise.

settings.image_placeholder: [ PHOTO: COA documents on a desk ]
settings.title: Show the paperwork
settings.text: Third-party testing, a certificate of analysis for each product, and plain-language labels. If a claim cannot survive a document request, it does not go on our packaging.

settings.title: No fear, no shame
settings.text: Shedding is normal. Slow seasons are normal. We will never market to your panic, only to your patience.

settings.heading: Four convictions we won't trade away.
settings.copy: Every formula, label, and email gets checked against these.

settings.label: Third-Party Tested
settings.body: Tested for purity, label accuracy, and quality.

settings.label: NSF-Certified Facility
settings.body: Manufactured to the highest quality standards.

settings.label: Made in the USA
settings.body: Produced with quality standards you can trust.

settings.heading: We only make three things. On purpose.
settings.copy: A gummy, a capsule, and a serum: one ritual that covers hair wellness from both sides. Making less means we can sweat every detail of each.
settings.supplement_placeholder: [ PHOTO: Gummies and capsules on a warm cream surface. Aspect 4:3. ]
settings.left_body:
Daily nutrition, two ways.
The same care in two formats: a passion fruit gummy you will actually remember to take, and a comprehensive capsule for women who want the deeper routine.
settings.serum_placeholder: [ PHOTO: Serum bottle with dropper, botanical styling. Aspect 4:3. ]
settings.right_body:
Botanical care for the scalp.
Rosemary, ginger root, and Densidyl in a lightweight, fragrance-free formula. A two-minute scalp massage that turns maintenance into a moment.

settings.heading: Little moments from the ritual.
settings.subtext: From our community, our desks, and our morning counters.

settings.heading: Grow with us.
settings.body: One ritual, three honest products, and a brand that tells you the truth about timelines.
